TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Au-Ke-Lan == satabakiyay nu tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (kamu nu Hulam: Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) nu kitidaan itida i nutimulan a taypinyung timul nu sasulitan 37 tu' (37 00 S, (Auckland) šĹćśĖľŚćóŚ§™ŚĻ≥śīčŚćóÁ∑Į37Śļ¶. u New Zealand itini i amisan u satabakiay nu tukayan, pangangan han "sipayapaya nu balunga a tukay" , tayaw u New Zealand nu kungan atu tatelungan nu patiyamay. . sayaway nu nipatideng tu suotu i New Zealand u Au-Ke-Lan , nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1865) a mihecaan malimad taydan i amisan nu subal sakatimul tu a Uy-Lin-Dun . . aydaay a New Zealand u New Zealand saka limulakay a kakitidaan, u nantaypinyang a angangan nu kakididaan, u cacumudan nu tataydaan nu midang a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan u sakapahay nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipilian, Au-Ke-Lan u sakaliman nu sakapahay nu kitakitan.
S.PHON: == au-k…ô-r~…ĺan == satabakijaj nu tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) nu kitidaan itida i nutimur~…ĺan a tajpinjuŇč timur~…ĺ nu sasur~…ĺitan ** tu Ē~ ° (** ** s, (au ¶kr~…ĺand) ***********. u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand itini i amisan u satabakiaj nu tukajan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "sipajapaja nu bar~…ĺuŇča a tukaj" , tajaw u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand nu kuŇčan atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu patijamaj. . sajawaj nu nipatid…ôŇč tu suotu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan , nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan mar~…ĺimad tajdan i amisan nu subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ tu a uj-r~…ĺin-dun . . ajdaaj a n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand saka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj a kakitidaan, u nantajpinjaŇč a aŇčaŇčan nu kakididaan, u ¶a ¶umudan nu tatajdaan nu midaŇč a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan u sakapańßaj nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipir~…ĺian, au-k…ô-r~…ĺan u sakar~…ĺiman nu sakapańßaj nu kitakitan.
S.FORM: == Au-Ke-Lan == satabakiyay nu tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (kamu nu Hulam: Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) nu kitidaan itida i nutimulan a taypinyung timul nu sasulitan 37 tu' (37 00 S, (Auckland) šĹćśĖľŚćóŚ§™ŚĻ≥śīčŚćóÁ∑Į37Śļ¶. u New Zealand itini i amisan u satabakiay nu tukayan, pangangan han "sipayapaya nu balunga a tukay" , tayaw u New Zealand nu kungan atu tatelungan nu patiyamay. . sayaway nu nipatideng tu suotu i New Zealand u Au-Ke-Lan , nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1865) a mihecaan malimad taydan i amisan nu subal sakatimul tu a Uy-Lin-Dun . . aydaay a New Zealand u New Zealand saka limulakay a kakitidaan, u nantaypinyang a angangan nu kakididaan, u cacumudan nu tataydaan nu midang a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan u sakapahay nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipilian, Au-Ke-Lan u sakaliman nu sakapahay nu kitakitan.
S.PHON: == au-k…ô-r~…ĺan == satabakijaj nu tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) nu kitidaan itida i nutimur~…ĺan a tajpinjuŇč timur~…ĺ nu sasur~…ĺitan ** tu Ē~ ° (** ** s, (au ¶kr~…ĺand) ***********. u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand itini i amisan u satabakiaj nu tukajan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "sipajapaja nu bar~…ĺuŇča a tukaj" , tajaw u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand nu kuŇčan atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu patijamaj. . sajawaj nu nipatid…ôŇč tu suotu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan , nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan mar~…ĺimad tajdan i amisan nu subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ tu a uj-r~…ĺin-dun . . ajdaaj a n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand saka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj a kakitidaan, u nantajpinjaŇč a aŇčaŇčan nu kakididaan, u ¶a ¶umudan nu tatajdaan nu midaŇč a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan u sakapańßaj nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipir~…ĺian, au-k…ô-r~…ĺan u sakar~…ĺiman nu sakapańßaj nu kitakitan.
